name: Magic Coloring Book
author: Poki
description: Magic Coloring Book is a coloring book where every stroke of your brush brings colorful magic to life! Explore various drawings from charming Kawaii Food to lovable animals, Fashion & Beauty, and whimsical Magic & Fantasy themes. With boundless color options and total artistic freedom, unleash your imagination and create stunning masterpieces. Whether you prefer precise brushwork or filling in with the bucket tool, the choice is yours! Unlock extra palettes for even more vibrant hues, and don't forget to save and share your creations with friends. Let's color our way to magic! How to play Magic Coloring Book? Click to choose the painting and the color you like; click and drag to paint. Who created Magic Coloring Book? Magic Coloring Book is created by Refold. Play their other game on Poki: Car Parking Jam and Sector 781 ! How can I play Magic Coloring Book for free? You can play Magic Coloring Book for free on Poki. Can I play Magic Coloring Book on mobile devices and desktop? Magic Coloring Book can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
